description: Shared a11y known-violation baseline (tempdoc 615 §13 Move 2). ONE authority for the per-surface axe rules accepted in the DETERMINISTIC route-mock capture state (jseval ui-shot --fixtures). Consumed by the Python ui-shot measurement (flags NEW-vs-known) AND the TS e2e accessibility-audit gate, so the tiers cannot silently disagree about 'passing' (§13.3 / P3). knownRules = accepted debt; a violation NOT listed is NEW and must be investigated. Regenerate via scripts/jseval/experiments/regen_a11y_baseline.py after a deliberate change.
